TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: Faruk, M. J. H., Alam, F., Islam, M., et al. (2024). Transforming online voting: a novel system utilizing blockchain and biometric verification for enhanced security, privacy, and transparency. Cluster Computing.
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Uses Hyperledger Fabric blockchain with biometric verification (fingerprint/face recognition). Identity is verified before vote casting and vote records are stored immutably on blockchain.
GAP: Does not clearly separate off-chain authentication and on-chain voting; no Aadhaar/national-ID integration; lacks double biometric confirmation before vote commit.

TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: Peace engineering: The contribution of blockchain systems to the e-voting process (2021). Technological Forecasting & Social Change.
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Conceptual analysis of how blockchain improves transparency, trust, and election security.
GAP: Theoretical work only; lacks implementation details, biometric integration, and authentication workflow.

TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: E-voting system using cloud-based hybrid blockchain technology (2024). Journal of Network and Systems Security Research.
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Uses hybrid blockchain architecture with digital signatures and cloud-based infrastructure for scalable voting.
GAP: Authentication relies on digital signatures; no biometric hardware integration or off-chain identity verification.

TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: A Blockchain-Based E-Voting System for India: Addressing Security Challenges with Aadhaar Card Authentication (IEEE Conference).
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Integrates Aadhaar-based identity verification with blockchain voting framework for Indian election context.
GAP: Aadhaar mostly used at registration stage; no repeated biometric verification or explicit off-chain authentication model.

TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: BlockVOTE: An Architecture of a Blockchain-based Electronic Voting System (IEEE).
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Provides blockchain architecture emphasizing immutability, auditability, and smart-contract-driven voting.
GAP: Focuses on blockchain layer only; does not solve voter authentication or biometric validation.

TITLE AUTHOR & YEAR: Secure E-Voting System using Blockchain Technology and Authentication via Face Recognition and Mobile OTP (IEEE).
METHOD / TECHNIQUE USED: Uses face recognition and OTP-based authentication before vote submission to blockchain.
GAP: Software-based authentication only; no hardware biometrics, Aadhaar integration, or off-chain privacy-preserving verification.
